profile.name: Custom Build (Heavy)
profile.description: Modular heavy-lift component build — assembled at runtime.

airframe.propellers: 22x6.6 inch Carbon Fiber (upper) / 22x7.0 inch Carbon Fiber (lower)

motor_imbalance.description: Coaxial opposing pair divergence — one motor above high threshold while its coaxial opposite falls below low threshold indicates the flight controller is fighting a propulsion failure on that arm.

context_window.description: ±2 seconds at 10 Hz nominal logging rate
